candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line with populated values; best match for top-line sales.
Also a total revenue line and equal to reported sales; useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Header only, not the numeric line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list of reported revenue labels; both represent the top line, with the more specific operating sales label first.

candidates.why: Explicit direct cost / cost of sales line with full values; best COGS match.
Direct production input cost component, but narrower than full cost of revenue.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility - Unclassified
candidates.why: Underlying material-cost component, not full COGS.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Preferred the explicit full cost-of-revenue line over narrower material expense components.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line, populated, and already excludes R&D; preferred over components and totals.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A component, but a component should not be used when an explicit SG&A row exists.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but should not be added to XSGA because selected SG&A row explicitly excludes R&D.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Selected only the explicit populated SG&A row per hierarchy rule. Did not add R&D because this row explicitly excludes it.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D disclosure, but the primary income statement R&D line is preferable.
Supplemental disclosure mirroring the main R&D amount.

variables.notes: A dedicated R&D line exists, but the selected XSGA row explicitly excludes R&D. Per the provided rule, XRD is left empty to avoid subtracting R&D from SG&A when it is not included there.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; best standard mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Equivalent recurring interest expense concept and numerically identical here; acceptable fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost, but likely a component of total interest expense and would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Using a priority list of direct interest-expense labels. Excluded lease-interest supplemental row to avoid double counting with total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes minority interest and is attributable to parent shareholders.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Also parent-only equity and a good fallback if the preferred label changes.
Appears equal to parent equity here and excludes minority interest; usable fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity lines so BE excludes non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Explicit balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best MIB match.
Equivalent minority interest line elsewhere on the balance sheet; good fallback if label changes.
Income statement allocation, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Mapped to explicit balance-sheet minority interest lines as a priority list.
